steps.name: before
steps.text:
Setup is not receiving identity input yet. Choose a starter profile, type your city and state, or use Tab and Enter to continue with fields you control.
Workspace Setup
Step 1 of 5
Identity

Define your local news outlet name and mission.

Starter profiles
Longmont
Brighton
Denver

These identity fields are optional during setup and can be edited later in Settings before you publish.

Publication Name (optional)
Editor Name (optional)
Publisher Type

Nonprofit publication

State
Choose a starter profile or continue with the fields shown.
Continue setup

steps.name: after-longmont-click
steps.text:
Workspace Setup
Step 2 of 5
AI Service Setup

Check the connection to the local AI service that runs on your computer.

To continue, install the local AI runtime or choose Skip for now. Skipping is supported: source checks still work, and you can finish AI setup later from AI Model.
Choose how to continue

You can install local AI now, or skip it and finish setup. Source checks still work without AI.

Install local AI runtime
Checking...
Skip for now

Starting the local AI service...
